allow: Bash(rm -f config.php login.php register.php logout.php scanner.php save_scan.php history.php get_scan.php labs.php lab.php submit_flag.php quiz.php save_quiz_answer.php award_xp.php leaderboard.php profile.php about.php)
Bash(python -c "from scanner.advanced import check_virustotal, check_nvd_cve, VIRUSTOTAL_API_KEY; print\(''imports OK''\); print\(''VT key set:'', bool\(VIRUSTOTAL_API_KEY\)\)")
Bash(mysql -u root -pShequan123! hakdel -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, tier FROM quiz_questions GROUP BY tier;")

Bash(/dev/null -e "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total FROM quiz_questions WHERE category IN \(''it-fundamentals'',''terminal-linux'',''cs-fundamentals'',''networking'',''cyber-awareness'',''web-security'',''cryptography'',''malware'',''social-engineering'',''cloud-security'',''ceh-domains''\);")
Bash(/dev/null -e "SELECT id, SUBSTRING\(question,1,60\) as q, tier, domain FROM quiz_questions WHERE category=''''ceh-domains'''' AND tier=1 ORDER BY id;")
Bash(/dev/null -e "SELECT id, LEFT\(question,55\) as q, tier, domain FROM quiz_questions WHERE category=''ceh-domains'' ORDER BY tier, id LIMIT 40;")
Bash(/dev/null -e "SELECT id, category, tier FROM quiz_questions WHERE id IN \(1,2,3,4,5,6,7,8\);")

Bash(mysql -u root -pShequan123! hakdel -e 'SHOW TABLES; DESCRIBE quiz_categories; DESCRIBE quiz_questions; DESCRIBE quiz_tier_progress; DESCRIBE labs; DESCRIBE users; SELECT slug, name, level_required FROM quiz_categories ORDER BY sort_order; SELECT category, tier, COUNT\(*\) as count FROM quiz_questions GROUP BY category, tier ORDER BY category, tier;')
Bash(mysql -u root -pShequan123! hakdel -e "SHOW TABLES; DESCRIBE users;")
Bash(mysql -u root -pShequan123! hakdel -e "DESCRIBE email_verifications; DESCRIBE password_resets;")
